title: Spec TZ Graph Profile
purpose: Turn specifications from standalone text documents into canonical graph specs with generated human-readable TZ, implementation handoff and acceptance evidence.
non_goals: replace universal Evolutionary Object Graph core
make Markdown the source of truth
force every project into full graph depth
readiness_model: Universal T-level readiness with profile-specific gates for specification, implementation readiness and validation.
evidence_model: Accepted specification objects require source refs; AI extraction remains candidate evidence until reviewed.
quality_gates: feature has acceptance or approved exception
contract has provider and consumer when applicable
generated TZ is fresh against canonical specs
developer handoff lists owner, next batch and verification commands
safety_policy: No canonical write from AI extraction without review; generated TZ is projection, not source of truth.
retention_policy: Raw sources and extraction candidates stay in graph/source; generated documents can be rebuilt from canonical specs.
federation_policy: Specification graphs may export bounded readiness, impact and contract summaries without exposing private raw sources.
migration_policy: Legacy text specifications are mapped into candidates, reviewed, accepted into canonical specs and kept as transitional projections or archived.
